summary: Independent read-only QA review accepts the M6 task graph. The graph covers the Roadmap and acceptance-matrix M6 scope, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, has an acyclic dependency order, leaves M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 in REVIEW, exposes only M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 as the first downstream READY task, and keeps all other downstream M6 tasks in DRAFT. No forbidden product, package, content-source, tools, CI, roadmap, acceptance-matrix, prior gate, ADR, or product-code path was modified by the reviewed task graph.

tests_run.result: Initial review observed route/state changes while QA routing was being recorded. Final pre-handoff status showed no tracked working-tree diff and only pre-existing untracked ui-samples/ files, which are not accepted as M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 artifacts.
23 changed paths, all under allowed planning/status/message/task/model-routing/thread-registry areas for the review commit.
24 changed paths after route commit b9860836; added only QA routing/thread-registration metadata beyond a2a6599e.
M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is REVIEW; M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is READY; the other 13 downstream M6 tasks are DRAFT.
No dependency-ready output while M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 remains in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: PowerShell loop: taskctl validate every project/tasks/active/M6-*.json
tests_run.result: taskctl validate all M6 ok count=15.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON DAG/status check for all M6 tasks
tests_run.result: M6 JSON DAG/status check ok files=15 edges=41 graphStatus=REVIEW firstReady=M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 downstreamNonDraft=0.

tests_run.command: node -e routing/state check for goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, thread-registry, and QA route
tests_run.result: routing/state check ok: milestone M6, task M6-TASK-GRAPH-001, systems thread review_ready, QA thread reviewing, reviewCommit=a2a6599e, next_ready_tasks length 0.

tests_run.command: PowerShell changed-path scope guard for main...a2a6599e and main...HEAD
tests_run.result: scope guard ok for a2a6599e changedPaths=23; scope guard ok for HEAD changedPaths=24.
No whitespace errors reported for current working tree diff.
No whitespace errors reported for review commit diff.

decisions: ACCEPT: M6 graph coverage matches Roadmap and acceptance matrix M6: start-to-victory, diplomacy, legitimacy, succession completion, layered AI, policy/event/encyclopedia surfaces, three-scenario data pipeline, map candidate path, batch auto-run/balance dashboard, accessibility core flows, Alpha no P0/P1, adviser intervention, and M6 exit gate.

ACCEPT: Dependency graph is ordered and acyclic. M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 remains REVIEW; M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is the only first downstream READY task and is planning-only; all other downstream M6 tasks remain DRAFT.

ACCEPT: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is preserved. No M6 manual node battle implementation task, blocking spike, or blocking research task exists; mentions are exclusions or post-1.0 non-blocking candidate notes.

ACCEPT: The reviewed diff does not modify forbidden apps/packages/content-source/tools/.github/docs gate/roadmap/acceptance-matrix/ADR/product-code paths. The later b9860836 route commit only records QA routing/thread metadata.

ACCEPT: Architecture boundaries and Human Gates are preserved in task scopes. Downstream tasks require command parity, deterministic ordering, explicit schemas, no sim-core UI/DOM/Electron imports, no telemetry/server/accounts/mods, and ADR/Human Gate escalation where needed.
ACCEPT: No fabricated reviewer acceptance found. Systems handoff is REVIEW and valid; this QA handoff is the independent acceptance routed to lead_orchestrator.
risks: Current HEAD is b9860836 because a route-only commit was added after the requested review commit a2a6599e. QA reviewed a2a6599e as requested and checked that b9860836 only adds QA route/thread registration metadata.
Pre-existing untracked ui-samples/ files remain in the workspace and are not part of this acceptance.
M6 remains broad and several downstream tasks are R4; this acceptance covers the graph only, not future implementation correctness.
requested_action: Lead may accept M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 after validating this QA handoff, then close/integrate the planning task before starting downstream M6 implementation.
